text.title: Strategy Methods Core Rules
text.summary: 6 testable rules grounding this methodology. Each rule pairs a binary check + sourced rationale; the skip-this-methodology rule is the authoritative stop signal.

rule.statement: Produce the decision-record artefact required by this methodology with every required field of the JSON Schema in 02-output-contract.xml populated and non-null.
rule.rationale: Missing required fields propagate to downstream consumers as silent gaps; the validator script enforces this rule at CI time.

rule.statement: Apply the decision tree in 06-decision-tree.xml before authoring; record the leaf reached so reviewers can replay the routing.
rule.rationale: Skipping the decision tree leads to misapplied methodologies (e.g. running deep procedure on light scope); recording the leaf makes the application auditable.

rule.statement: Detect and prevent the antipattern 'default-swot': Require fit scores per candidate; reject SWOT when other methods score higher.
rule.rationale: Root cause: Author has no method experience beyond SWOT.

rule.statement: Detect and prevent the antipattern 'limitation-less': Force limitations array; minItems=1.
rule.rationale: Root cause: Author treats method choice as one-shot.

rule.statement: Detect and prevent the antipattern 'evidence-less-scores': Require rationale ≥30 chars per score axis.
When the decision tree resolves to skip-this-methodology, halt authoring; do NOT emit a partial artefact and do NOT proceed downstream with this methodology's outputs.
rule.rationale: Partial artefacts produced after a skip signal pollute downstream consumers and waste reviewer cycles; the skip leaf is an authoritative stop signal.
